name: Sam's Pizza ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all dough ingredients in the bread machine and program for dough and first rise.
2. At the end of the final cycle, remove the dough to a lightly oiled work surface. Cover with a clean towel and let rest 10 minutes.
3. Preheat oven to 475°F.
4. Roll out the dough to a 14-inch circle on a pan or pizza peel.
5. Spread the sauce in a thin layer over the dough.
6. Sprinkle the cheese evenly over the surface.
7. Slide the pizza into the oven and bake for 15 to 17 minutes.
